debug_info.goal:
m : ℕ
S : List (Call m)
hyp :
  ¬∀ c ∈ S,
      isAgentInitialCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentInitialCall m S c.2 c = true ∨
        ¬(isAgentInitialCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentInitialCall m S c.2 c = true)
⊢ False

proof:
have h : ∀ (c : Call m), c ∈ S → (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      by_cases hP : (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
      · exact Or.inl hP
      · exact Or.inr hP
    have h₂ : ∀ (c : Call m), c ∈ S → (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := h
    have h₃ : ∀ c ∈ S, (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact h₂ c hc
    exact hyp h₃
failed_attempts:
simp_all [isAgentInitialCall]
  | inr h₁ =>
    -- Case: ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
    simp_all [isAgentInitialCall]
    <;> aesop

sorry
have h_false : False := by sorry

· exact Or.inl h
    · exact Or.inr h
  intro c hc
  have h₁ := h (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
  cases h₁ with
  | inl h₁ => exact Or.inl h₁
  | inr h₁ => exact Or.inr h₁
  <;> simp_all
  <;> tauto

by_cases h : (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c = true ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c = true)
    · exact Or.inl h
    · exact Or.inr h

by_cases h : (isAgentInitialCall S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.2 c = true)
     · exact Or.inl h
     · exact Or.inr h
   exact hyp h2

intro c
    by_cases h : isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c
    · exact Or.inl h
    · exact Or.inr h
  have h₂ : ∀ (c : Call m), c ∈ S → (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
    intro c hc
    exact h₁ c
  have h₃ : ∀ c ∈ S, (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := h₂
  exfalso
  exact hyp h₃
only problem is that in Lean,

· exact Or.inl h
    · exact Or.inr h
  
  intro c hc
  have h₁ : (IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c) ∧ IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)) ∨ ¬ (IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c) ∧ IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)) := by
    have h₂ := h_main (Call m) S c hc
    exact h₂
  cases h₁ with
  | inl h₁ =>
    have h₂ : isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c := by simpa [IsTrue] using h₁.1
    have h₃ : isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c := by simpa [IsTrue] using h₁.2
    exact Or.inl ⟨h₂, h₃⟩
  | inr h₁ =>
    have h₂ : ¬ (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro h₃
      have h₄ : IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c) := by
        simpa [IsTrue] using h₃.1
      have h₅ : IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
        simpa [IsTrue] using h₃.2
      have h₆ : IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c) ∧ IsTrue (isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := ⟨h₄, h₅⟩
      exact h₁ h₆
    exact Or.inr h₂

rcases List.exists_mem_of_ne_nil (by
      by_contra h
      simp_all [List.nil_eq_nil]) with ⟨c, hc, _⟩
    simp_all [List.mem_cons, List.mem_nil_iff]
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try tauto) <;>
    (try simp_all [isAgentInitialCall]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try ring_nf at *) <;>
    (try aesop)

by_cases h : (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
    · exact Or.inl h
    · exact Or.inr h
successful_attempts:
have h : ∀ (c : Call m), c ∈ S → (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      by_cases hP : (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
      · exact Or.inl hP
      · exact Or.inr hP
    have h₂ : ∀ (c : Call m), c ∈ S → (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := h
    have h₃ : ∀ c ∈ S, (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact h₂ c hc
    exact hyp h₃

have h₁ : ∀ c ∈ S, (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨ ¬(isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      by_cases h : (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
      · exact Or.inl h
      · exact Or.inr h
    exact hyp h₁
